scenario: Decline — carrier cannot cover, provides reason
subject: RE: Aerospace Shipment Wichita-Huntsville — Pass
body:
Hi Jillian,

We'll have to pass on this one. Our cargo insurance maxes out at $2M which doesn't meet the $5M requirement for this shipment. We also don't currently have any TWIC-carded drivers available that week.

Feel free to reach out on other loads though — we run the KS-AL corridor regularly and can usually help on standard freight.

Thanks,
Mid-American Trucking
Dispatch

expected_bid.terms: DECLINED — insufficient cargo insurance ($2M vs $5M required), no TWIC-carded drivers available
